AXEBOTS_NORMAL.title: Bedlam Bride Quest

BOWLBUGS_WEAK.description: A small scouting party of dungeon vermin.

FABRICATOR_NORMAL.title: Spiders Quest

FAKE_MERCHANT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descriptio: That vendor looked suspicious. It was a trap.

FOGMOG_NORMAL.title: Stay Out of City Hall Quest
FOGMOG_NORMAL.description: A dungeon creature that hides in artificially generated fog.

INKLETS_NORMAL.description: Tiny shadow creatures that attack in overwhelming numbers.

MYSTERIOUS_KNIGHT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: Grimaldi's Traveling Circus
MYSTERIOUS_KNIGHT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descri: A lone knight guarding a corridor. Their intentions are unclear.

MYTES_NORMAL.description: Tiny parasitic creatures from the dungeon's organic waste.

NIBBITS_WEAK.description: A few lost nibbits looking for food.

OVICOPTER_NORMAL.description: An egg-dropping flying construct. Watch out below.
OWL_MAGISTRATE_NORMAL.title: Point Mongo

QUEEN_BOSS.description: Mother of the swarm. Her children will defend her to the death.
RUBY_RAIDERS_NORMAL.title: Safe Rooms

SEWER_CLAM_NORMAL.title: Silk Road

SLIMES_WEAK.description: Junior dungeon blobs. Still slimy, less threatening.

SOUL_NEXUS_ELITE.title: Waystation
SOUL_NEXUS_ELITE.description: A convergence point for dungeon spirits. Extremely dangerous.

TERROR_EEL_ELITE.title: Third Floor
TERROR_EEL_ELITE.description: An electrified eel from the dungeon's flooded corridors.
TEST_SUBJECT_BOSS.title: Stairwell
TEST_SUBJECT_BOSS.description: The dungeon AI's failed experiment. Now it's your problem.
THE_ARCHITECT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.title: Sixth Floor
THE_ARCHITECT_EVENT_ENCOUNTER.descriptio: The dungeon's chief designer challenges you personally.

THE_LOST_AND_FORGOTTEN_NORMAL.descriptio: Previous crawlers who never made it out. Now they haunt the halls.

THE_OBSCURA_NORMAL.description: A shadowy dungeon creature that exists between dimensions.
THIEVING_HOPPER_WEAK.title: Fourth Floor
THIEVING_HOPPER_WEAK.description: A small creature that steals your gold while you're not looking.

TOADPOLES_NORMAL.description: Juvenile amphibians swarming the dungeon corridors.

TOADPOLES_WEAK.description: A few baby toadpoles exploring beyond their nest.

TUNNELER_NORMAL.description: A burrowing creature that creates new dungeon passages.

TUNNELER_WEAK.description: A juvenile tunneler still learning to dig.
TURRET_OPERATOR_WEAK.title: A-team

VANTOM_BOSS.description: A vampiric phantom that drains life and sanity.
VINE_SHAMBLER_NORMAL.title: Wasteland
VINE_SHAMBLER_NORMAL.description: A plant creature shambling through the dungeon corridors.
